name_cn:
Authentic Grade
5BH211 New Version: New Season Miu Miu Crystal Chain Accessories Collection Handbag, iconic Matelasse embossed lambskin, unique Miu design, exquisite shoulder strap adorned with faux crystals, exuding a unique charm. The bag design reflects a refined and elegant style. Front features metal-engraved logo. Zipper closure. Satin and soft calfskin pockets. Height 16.5cm. Length 21cm. Width 5.5 cm (with original packaging)
